description: Figure 2 Amphibambusa fangchenggangensis (GMB7602, holotype). A. Bamboo host; B, C. Ascomata on the surface of the host; D, E. Longitudinal sections of ascomata; F. Peridium; G–I. Asci in distilled water; J. Paraphyses; K. A J+ apical apparatus bluing in Melzer's reagent; L–N. Ascospores (N: in Indian ink). Scale bars: 0.2 mm (B–D); 100 µm (E); 10 µm (F–N).
